---
description: "Full feature development workflow from a JIRA ticket to a submitted PR. Reads the ticket, plans implementation, writes code, self-reviews, and creates a Pull Request."
agent: "orchestrator"
argument-hint: "JIRA ticket URL or key (e.g., PROJ-123)"
---

# Feature Workflow

Implement a feature end-to-end from a JIRA ticket.

Follow the canonical workflow defined in `workflows/feature.md`.

Begin by asking for the JIRA ticket if not provided in the prompt.
